delete_modal.title: Delete Course
delete_modal.description: Are you sure you want to delete this course? This action cannot be undone. What should we do with the tasks included in this course?
delete_modal.delete_orphaned_tip: Tasks that belong only to this course will be permanently deleted. Tasks used in other courses will remain.
delete_modal.keep_tasks_tip: The course itself will be deleted, but all its tasks will remain in the studio (unlinked from this course).
